# HomeListingAI — AI Platform for Loan Officers and Real Estate Agents

## What It Is
HomeListingAI is an AI-powered operating system for loan officers (LOs) and real estate agent teams.

Primary users: Mortgage loan officers who want warm leads and stronger agent partnerships.
Secondary users: Real estate agents who need AI-powered listing pages, lead capture, and share kits.

## Core Value Proposition
Loan officers send a "WOW link" to real estate agents. The agent sees a live demo of their listing with the LO's AI mortgage chatbot built in. When the agent signs up and publishes a listing, every buyer lead from that listing routes back to the loan officer — pre-qualified, with financing intent.

Result: Loan officers build a pipeline of warm mortgage leads through agent partnerships, without cold calling.

## How It Works (4-Step Flow)
1. Loan officer sends a WOW link to a real estate agent (10 seconds, via email)
2. Agent clicks the link, sees the live demo, claims their account in one tap
3. Agent publishes their listing — share kit goes live with tracked QR code, social asset, open house flyer
4. Loan officer receives warm, pre-qualified buyer leads from every listing the agent runs

## Automated Reminders
- If the agent doesn't open the WOW link within 24 hours, an automated follow-up email is sent
- If still no action at 72 hours, a second reminder fires
- The loan officer is notified via text + email the moment an agent claims their account

## Features
- WOW Link: personalized agent invite with live AI listing demo
- Share Kit: QR code, social post asset, open house flyer, sign rider PDF — all tracked by source
- AI Buyer Chatbot: answers financing questions 24/7 on every listing page
- Lead Capture: every buyer who scans, clicks, or asks a question is captured
- Lead Inbox: leads scored by intent (hot/warm/cold) and routed to the LO
- LO Dashboard: agent partnerships, listing performance, lead pipeline
- Agent Dashboard: listing builder, share kit, performance analytics

## Pricing
- Free tier: up to 5 WOW links/month, basic listing pages
- LO Starter ($149/mo): up to 250 WOW links/month, full share kit, lead routing
- LO Pro ($299/mo): unlimited WOW links, white label, priority lead alerts

## Who This Is For
- Mortgage loan officers (primary)
- Real estate agents partnered with a loan officer (secondary)
- Small broker teams and branch managers (office tier)

HomeListingAI — Founded by Chris Potter, 15+ years mortgage industry experience.
